task_description: Write a method in Dafny to find all words which are at least 4 characters long in a string.
specification_response:
method FindLongWords(s: string) returns (longWords: seq<string>)
Postconditions_prompt:
    - The sequence longWords contains all words from the input string s that have length at least 4
    - Every word in longWords is a substring of s separated by whitespace or punctuation
    - All words in longWords have length greater than or equal to 4
